---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What pain point are you trying to solve? Real example helps.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it works. Mocks / pseudo-code welcome but not required.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they did not fit.

## Scope check

- [ ] This is in scope for TokenIsland (Claude / Codex, notch panel, local-only).
- [ ] Cross-CLI generality (Gemini / Cursor / ...) is *not* in scope — those belong to CodeIsland.
